New Year Email Outreach Example

Hi [NAME], hope you had a great holiday and new year!



Back in the fall, we discussed possibly working on a sales letter for your greens or probiotics offers. So I wanted to circle back and see if you were still looking for someone to help you with those projects. Or if you had any other copy assignments coming up in Q1 of this year.



Let me know, talk soon!



-Brian 



P.S. As a quick refresher, we met at the virtual Copy Accelerator event last September. I'm a health and fitness copywriter with over $100MM in sales for clients like Primal Labs, Organifi, and VShred.

New Year Email Outreach Template

Hi [NAME], hope you had a great holiday and new year!

[Cite time of last conversation] we discussed possibly working on [cite last project]. So I wanted to circle back and see if you were still looking for someone to help you with those projects. Or if you had any other [type of projects] coming up in Q1 of this year.

Let me know, talk soon!

[SIGNATURE]

P.S. As a quick refresher, [remind them how you were connected]. I'm a [highlight your expertise, credibility, and credentials].
